rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, did it anyway. That's a round won on hard mode. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, change room, active choice — counts even with the poncho. But the Apollo ring and necklace at work? Avoided, named, still lost. The frontier is still his people, and work is the sharpest edge of it.
pattern: They're louder when the audience knows him — strangers barely register, but workmates and swim crew still have the volume cranked.
